items.front: When must RVR values be furnished if RVR equipment is operational?
items.back: Furnish the values for the runway in use whenever the equipment is operational, regardless of later nav-aid or visual-aid status or whether RVR will apply as landing or takeoff minima.

items.front: When is touchdown RVR issued, and when are midpoint or rollout values added?
items.back: Issue touchdown RVR when visibility is 1 mile or less, when RVR is reportable, and before each landing or departure. Add midpoint or rollout when either is below 2,000 feet and lower than touchdown RVR.

items.front: How is RVR transmitted, including off-scale or rapidly varying conditions?
items.back: State the runway, "RVR," and the value, adding touchdown, midpoint, or rollout as needed. Use "MORE THAN" or "LESS THAN" for off-scale values and "variable" with the range for rapid changes.
